name: Prophix FP&A Platform API
what_it_does: Prophix REST API for mid-market financial planning and analysis (FP&A) and corporate performance management (CPM). Enables AI agents to load and retrieve budget and forecast data, access financial reports and KPI dashboards, manage planning model versions, import actuals from ERP and accounting systems, automate variance analysis, and integrate Prophix financial data with business intelligence tools.
use_cases: Importing ERP actuals into Prophix budgets from financial close automation agents
Retrieving budget vs actual variance reports from FP&A reporting agents
Automating rolling forecast updates from financial planning agents
Integrating Prophix planning data with BI dashboards from analytics agents
not_for: Large enterprise with SAP/Oracle EPM at scale without mid-market fit
Operational accounting and transaction processing without planning focus
Consumer financial planning without enterprise FP&A workflows
best_when: A mid-market finance team using Prophix wants AI agents to automate the data flow between ERP actuals and planning models, generate variance reports, and maintain rolling forecasts.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Budget data informs resource allocation and executive decisions. Automated updates must be validated against source ERP data before affecting approved financial plans.

auth.notes: Prophix uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Service account credentials provided per deployment. API included with enterprise subscriptions. On-premises and cloud deployments available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise FP&A pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing based on users and modules
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Mississauga, Ontario). Mid-market FP&A focus. Competes with Adaptive Insights, Planful, and Vena for mid-market. Both cloud SaaS and on-premises deployment options.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented with enterprise contracts

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Budget and forecast data drives resource allocation — validate all automated updates
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 service credentials
No webhooks — must use scheduled jobs for data sync
On-prem vs cloud deployments have different API configurations
Canadian company — data residency options include CA, US, EU
Planning model complexity requires understanding of Prophix dimension structure
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: FP&A budget and forecast data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 service credentials. Canadian company with multi-region data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Budget and financial planning data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region data residency (CA/US/EU).
